meaning: adj.隴ｦ諠慕噪,豕ｨ諢冗噪,隴ｦ謌堤噪
examples: The best thing is to be watchful and see the family doctor for any change in your normal health.
At first, she was very nervous and the robin himself was indignantly watchful.
His mother kept a watchful eye on him.
Watchful waiting should be the first step in treatment, and medication a last resort.
Inside, I found a beefy, watchful, fair-haired man, who said his name was Armando.
